summary: Manual Crypto Deposit feature testing complete. All backend API tests passed (8/8). All frontend UI elements and interactions verified working: crypto selector with 5 options (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL), QR code generation, wallet address display, copy button, amount preset buttons, custom amount input, tx hash input, screenshot upload area, submit button with disabled state, blockchain confirmation animation overlay, and deposit history with 'Confirming' status.

issues: Clipboard copy button shows runtime error in console when clicked (NotAllowedError: Write permission denied) - this is expected in automated testing but may need fallback handling for browsers without clipboard API permission

backend: POST /api/deposits with valid tx_hash returns 200 with blockchain_confirming status
POST /api/deposits with amount < 10 returns 400 error with 'Minimum deposit: $10'
POST /api/deposits works with all currencies (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL)
GET /api/deposits returns list of user deposits with correct structure
frontend: Deposit page renders at /deposit with data-testid='deposit-page'
Crypto selector dropdown opens and shows all 5 options (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL)
Selecting different crypto updates wallet address correctly (BTC: bc1..., ETH: 0x..., USDT: T..., LTC: ltc1..., SOL: 7...)
QR code element present and updates with crypto selection
Wallet address displayed correctly for each crypto
Copy wallet address button present and clickable
Amount preset buttons ($50, $100, $250, $500, $1000) toggle selection correctly
Custom amount input field present and functional
Transaction hash input field present and functional
Submit button is disabled when tx hash is empty
Submit button becomes enabled after entering tx hash
Submit deposit form triggers blockchain confirmation animation overlay
Blockchain confirmation overlay shows animated rings, amount, crypto symbol, and step progress
After confirmation animation completes (~10s), deposit appears in history list
Deposit history shows deposits with 'Confirming' status

critical_code_review_comments: Deposit feature implemented correctly with 3-step flow as specified
Blockchain confirmation animation is visually appealing with rotating rings and step-by-step progress
All data-testid attributes present for testing
MOCKED: Crypto wallet addresses are sample addresses (no real blockchain integration)
MOCKED: Deposit approval is manual by admin - deposits stay in 'blockchain_confirming' status until admin approves
seed_data_creation: Using pre-seeded master user account. Multiple test deposits created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual crypto deposit feature fully working. Login bypass: set localStorage.setItem('orbital_token', '<token>') then navigate to /deposit. Token obtained via POST /api/auth/login. Crypto wallet addresses are MOCKED sample addresses. Deposits stay in 'blockchain_confirming' status until admin approves via PUT /api/admin/deposits/{id}.

mocked_apis.note: Crypto wallet addresses are sample addresses. No real blockchain integration. Deposit approval is manual by admin.
mocked_list: Crypto wallet addresses (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL)

feature_verification.deposit_page_3_step_flow: VERIFIED - Step 1: Select crypto, Step 2: View QR + wallet address, Step 3: Submit tx hash + optional screenshot
feature_verification.crypto_selector: VERIFIED - All 5 cryptos (BTC, ETH, USDT, LTC, SOL) with correct wallet addresses
feature_verification.qr_code: VERIFIED - Generated via api.qrserver.com, updates with crypto selection
feature_verification.wallet_address: VERIFIED - Displays correctly for each crypto
feature_verification.copy_button: VERIFIED - Present and clickable (clipboard permission may vary by browser)
feature_verification.tx_hash_input: VERIFIED - Required field, enables submit button when filled
feature_verification.screenshot_upload: VERIFIED - Upload area present with file input
feature_verification.submit_button: VERIFIED - Disabled when tx hash empty, enabled when filled
feature_verification.blockchain_confirmation_overlay: VERIFIED - Animated overlay with rings, amount, steps progress, tx hash display
feature_verification.deposit_history: VERIFIED - Shows deposits with 'Confirming' status after submission
